title: The Ultimate Cobblemon Modpack
description: A not too large modpack full of vanilla changes and additions to cobblemon.
body:
# Cobblemon Changes
-Mega evolutions added

-Breeding added

-Chain encounters to raise the possibility of better stats and hidden abilities

-QoL changes added to cobblemon

-Ride on Cobblemon

-SimpleTMs

-Capture XP

-Cobblemon Integrations

-Legendary Spawn Notification

-Parting Gifts

## Minecraft Changes
-Xeros Minimap and Worldmap for easier traveling

-Some Yung's structures to enhance exporing

-Lootr for no loot competition

-Elytra slot

-Expanded Storage

-Explorify

-Upgradable Furnaces and Chests

-Biome Locator

-Sophisticated Storage and Backpack

-Waystones

-Better sound physics

-Aether added
